name: Outro
_source: s;Krista;Uh, thanks?{w} Look, if you want something, just say it.
s;Tora;Everyone wanted to thank you for saving them.{w} So, here.

s;Krista;Tora, we can't accept this.|{c:e;Krista;CloseEyes}It was our fault that Circ's Talons came here.|{c:e;Krista;HalfCloseEyes}We basically led them right to you all and put everyone in danger.|{c:e;Krista;NormalBlink}Honestly, it would be better if we left right now.|Keep the reward. You and everyone else need it more than we do.
s;Tora;Y'know, I expected you to take everything and run.|{c:e;Tora;NormalBlink,Smile}Glad you proved me wrong, Snake-Eyes.
s;Felicity;I told you she was trustworthy.|{c:e;Felicity;HalfCloseEyes,Smile}Just more evidence you should listen to me more.

s;Tora;Aw, don't give me that crap.|{c:e;Tora;NormalBlink,NoSmile}But seriously, I got a feeling everyone still doesn't trust Medeans,|{c:e;Tora;Smile}but what happened tonight might help start turnin' things around.|{c:e;Tora;CloseEyes,Smile}Personally, I still don't trust y'all yet,{c:e;Tora;FarWink,Smile} but I can't deny you did good.
s;Krista;I'm glad.|{c:e;Krista;NoSmile}But, hey, we really should get going before things get worse.

s;Tora;About that,{c:music_clear}{c:m;Together We Ride}{c:e;Tora;Smile} I'm joining up with you guys.|{c:e;Tora;CloseEyes}Those Talons struttin' around like they think they know what all us Shifters want{tgm}...|{c:e;Tora;NormalBlink}{tgm}It seriously ticks me off!|So, I wanna knock some sense into them myself.
s;Krista;Well, we'd be happy to have you, Tora.
s;Tora;Yeah, yeah.{w}{c:e;Tora;NormalBlink} Don't think this means we're friends now or anything.
s;Tora;Yeah, I get it.|I'm gonna be staying behind and help rebuild the place.|{c:e;Tora;Smile}You guys get a good punch in on Circ's Talons for me, y'hear?
s;Krista;I'm sure you guys know why I woke you all up so early.
s;Kai;To discuss the possibility of a traitor, right?
s;Forrest;Do you have any theories as to who it could be, Your Highness?

s;Krista;I have a couple ideas, but I'm not completely sure about any of them.|{c:e;Krista;HalfCloseEyes}I don't want to press on with a traitor in our group,|but we're so close to Orobas now.|{c:e;Krista;NormalBlink}We have to keep going!
s;Kai;Hate to say it, but I agree.|{c:e;Krista;NormalBlink}We're so close that it won't even matter if they interfere now.
s;Felicity;Then we proceed with the original plan?
s;Krista;We're gonna have to.|{c:e;Krista;NormalBlink}Alright, let's rest up for a while longer. Then, we head out!
